field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable this rule for live flow application matching.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional note to describe why this custom application rule exists.

field.label: Match Type
field.help: Select which flow field should be matched. Domain checks server.name, IP and CIDR check client/server IPs, port checks server.port, and protocol checks L7 protocol text.

field.label: Match Value
field.help: 每行一个匹配值，命中任意一行即视为匹配。Domain 类型：填写域名子串，如 weixin.qq.com。IP 类型：每行一个 IP 地址。CIDR 类型：每行一个 CIDR 段，如 10.10.0.0/24。Port 类型：每行一个端口号。Protocol 类型：每行一个 L7 协议名，如 TLS.WeChat。

field.label: Application Label
field.help: Custom application name shown in the active flow protocol column when this rule matches.
